wizard.qa.output_dir.description: Qawkhankiri qillqaña kawkhantix lurata bundle yänakax qillqatäñapawa. Qhipa bundle archivo ukax ./dist/<bundle-id>.gtbundle ukaruw aka directorio manqhan qillqatäni.
